thought.text:
Store hoisted from inner loop to outer body. But still in outer loop. The outer loop's preheader hoist couldn't because... hmm, why? `%i.0` is the outer loop's induction var, so it's NOT loop-invariant for the outer loop. Right, only inner-loop-invariant.

Anyway, this saves 59 stores per outer iter. Let me run scoring:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | tail -25 | head -22
